match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene1",
    "title": "Studio Lipstick Reveal",
    "storyBeat": "Introduce Scarlett and the coral lipstick in intimate close-up preparation",
    "durationSeconds": 12,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh intimate preparation with sensory effortless cool mood"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene2",
    "title": "Promenade Stroll",
    "storyBeat": "Scarlett walks along the boardwalk with ocean energy",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Breezy relaxed coastal morning with effortless cool energy"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene3",
    "title": "Shoreline Product Shot",
    "storyBeat": "Climax with lipstick in sand and final wide ocean reveal",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE - CONTINUOUS",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Serene expansive morning beach mood, fresh sensory and effortlessly cool"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
